title: Gussonea macrorrhynchia
taxonomy: Gussonea macrorrhynchia is a species of shell-less freshwater snail, and it belongs to the family Hydrobiidae. This classification is due to its unique characteristics and its close relationship with other snails in the Hydrobiidae family. As a member of this family, it is also classified as a type of aquatic gastropod mollusk. Furthermore, it is also known as a member of the phylum Mollusca, which includes a wide range of marine and freshwater mollusks. The classification of Gussonea macrorrhynchia is an example of the complex relationships within the animal kingdom.
